# convoso-js

> Unofficial TypeScript SDK for the Convoso API

## Overview

convoso-js is a zero-dependency, fully typed TypeScript SDK for the Convoso call center API. It covers all 37 API endpoints across 16 resources, with auto-pagination, automatic retry with exponential backoff, and request/response hooks.

- Package: `npm install convoso-js`
- Node.js 18+ required (native fetch)
- License: MIT
- Source: https://github.com/thornebridge/convoso-js

## Quick Start

```typescript
import { Convoso } from 'convoso-js';

const client = new Convoso({
  authToken: process.env.CONVOSO_TOKEN!,
  maxRetries: 3,
});

const { results } = await client.leads.search({ list_id: '333', limit: 100 });

for await (const entry of client.dnc.searchAll({ campaign_id: '500' })) {
  console.log(entry.phone_number);
}
```

## Documentation

- Full docs: https://thornebridge.github.io/convoso-js/
- Getting Started: https://thornebridge.github.io/convoso-js/guide/getting-started
- Configuration: https://thornebridge.github.io/convoso-js/guide/configuration
- Error Handling: https://thornebridge.github.io/convoso-js/guide/error-handling
- Retry & Hooks: https://thornebridge.github.io/convoso-js/guide/retry-and-hooks
- Auto-Pagination: https://thornebridge.github.io/convoso-js/guide/pagination
- API Reference: https://thornebridge.github.io/convoso-js/api-reference/
- Comprehensive reference: https://thornebridge.github.io/convoso-js/llms-full.txt
